title: Bark Carpets
body:
# Bark Carpets

Revamp your Minecraft interiors with the Bark Carpets mod!

Tired of the same old floor designs in your Minecraft builds? The Bark Carpets mod introduces a versatile and aesthetic solution to your decorative needs. Transform logs, wood, and stripped wood into beautiful, natural carpets that add a touch of rustic charm to any space.

## Features:

- Wood Carpets: Crafted from wood blocks, these carpets offer a classic wooden texture.
- Log Carpets: Made using logs, perfect for a rugged, natural look.
- Stripped Carpets: Utilize stripped wood for a sleek and refined floor covering.

## Seamless Integration:

- As of version 1.1.0, fully compatible with Fabric 1.21.
- Recipes are intuitive and blend seamlessly with the vanilla Minecraft crafting system.

## Inspired Design:

- Drawing inspiration from the moss carpet in vanilla Minecraft, this mod provides a unique way to enhance your builds with nature-inspired aesthetics.

With the Bark Carpets mod, you can elevate your interior design, making your Minecraft world more cozy and visually appealing. It's an ideal addition for builders and decorators looking to add a unique touch to their creations.

_Download now and start decorating with the natural elegance of Bark Carpets!_

## Compatibility:

The Bark Carpets mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21, 1.20.5, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bark-carpets/versions?l=fabric)

These versions for Forge:
- [1.20-1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bark-carpets/versions?l=forge)

These versions for NeoForge:
- [1.20.2, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bark-carpets/versions?l=neoforge)
